title: metrosideros collina var. lutea
intro: Metrosideros collina var. lutea, also known as yellow puka or yellow New Zealand rata, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high antioxidant content, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros collina var. lutea, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
